functions.comment: Decompose vector v into components parallel and perpendicular to normal n. If n has zero magnitude both outputs are zeroed; otherwise proj_out = dot(v,n)/dot(n,n)*n, perp_out = v - proj_out.
Compute the angle (radians, via acos) between two 3D vectors v1 and v2. Returns angle offset from PI/2 (i.e. returns acos(dot(v1,v2)/(|v1||v2|)) - PI/2).
Reflect vector v about surface normal n: out = v - 2*dot(v,n)*n.
